title: BanHammerPlugin
description: The BanHammer plugin adds a unique administration tool — the Ban Hammer.
body:
# 📦 Description
The BanHammer plugin adds a unique administration tool — the Ban Hammer. Forget about typing long /ban commands in chat. Simply take this special item in your hand, right-click on the offender, and they will be instantly punished.

# ⚙️ Main Features

- Special item: Customizable name (§l§4BAN HAMMER) and lore (description).
- Simple usage: Right-click on a player to issue a ban.
- Configurable time: Ban duration is set in the configuration (e.g., 60 seconds/minutes/days).
- Flexible messages: Customize the message shown to banned players upon login and the broadcast message sent to everyone.
- Permission separation: Separate permissions for obtaining the hammer (givebanhammer) and using it.
- Security: Permissions are granted only to server operators by default.

# 🔑 Commands and Permissions

- /givebanhammer — Gives yourself the Ban Hammer.
  - Permission: ru.shynert.banHammer.gbh
- Permission to use the hammer (clicking on a player):
  - Permission: ru.shynert.bahHammer.usage.banhammer
